raw_consumer_statement:
I have been disputing this account and going back-and-forth with Best Buy since XX/XX/2023. I keep getting the runaround and they keep denying my dispute but keep continue to tell me to refill it over and over. I order earphones for my daughter and went on vacation for her birthday, which is XX/XX/XXXX I get back And go and pick up the earphones and ask in the statement below I was initially told that they were sent back because I took too long to pick them up. It has been back-and-forth since then between customer service and Best Buy store. Story short they keep sending back my dispute, saying that the companies policy is to ask for identification, which was not done According to the manager who works at the Best Buy location in XXXX Delaware. She stated that they do have a lot of situations with the seasonal workers, not asking for identification and or just giving The wrong items to different consumers. 

After one of my disputes early this year they told me I needed a copy of a police report for the records to open up the dispute. So I called XXXX XXXX police and got a police report. 
I called Back give them the number and they tell me they never needed a police report, but took the Police report number, officer name, etc. I have submitted a claim to the Federal Trade Commission as well. I have uploaded a copy of my Was not in the state of Delaware during this transaction pick up I even sent in a statement that they asked me to send. I have done every single thing they asked me to do for almost a year, and this company is still going back-and-forth with me about this dispute, its been sitting dispute often on for almost a year and every time I call someone is telling me theyre getting it rectified its gon na be taken care of and it will be off of my credit report, but its not. 

To make matters first, they are Illegally negatively reporting, my account as past due To all three Credit borrows wow it is actively in dispute status I bring it to their attention and they tell me that they will be corrected but its never done. The company illegally lowered my credit limit based on the reporting that I am in Late status when I am not which has affected my income ratio due to no fault of my own.
